**Does this touch any of ProducerOS's hard boundaries?**

Check anything that applies -- these need extra scrutiny per
`docs/SECURITY_MODEL.md` / `AGENTS.md`:

- [ ] Would require an external API key or cloud service
- [ ] Would delete/rename/move/overwrite a music file automatically (no explicit approval step)
- [ ] Would generate marketing claims, numbers, or credits without a real, verifiable source
- [ ] Would require internet access after install
